data.body: STORY df83 (p0 gitutil.py index.lock TOCTOU): plan-review PASS signed, claimed. Design: single os.stat captures (st_dev,st_ino,st_mtime); judge stale by mtime age; module-level _reclaim_probe callable test-seam fires after stale-decision; re-stat identity+age immediately before os.remove, abort unlink on inode-change or refreshed-mtime. RED-first: seam+test with old unconditional remove -> fresh replacement deleted (RED) -> add re-validation -> survives (GREEN). NOTE discovered: fsck.py Check3 (~L148-171) has structurally identical getmtime->unconditional-remove TOCTOU, out of df83 scope - will create discovered_from ticket.
